chosen_evolution_point.selection_rationale: Given the delay stagnation and high diversity pressure, focusing on match_drop_phase.cpp offers an opportunity to explore phase dropping mechanisms that can improve delay without significantly compromising area. This module has been least used in recent iterations, aligning with the diversity pressure signal.

evolution_step.objective: Improve delay by optimizing phase dropping decisions
evolution_step.direction_and_strategy: Modify the required_margin_factor to be more aggressive in dropping phases that contribute to delay, ensuring that only phases that significantly improve delay are retained.
evolution_step.expected_impact: 1-2% delay reduction, tolerate up to 1% area increase
evolution_step.constraints: Preserve logical equivalence; maintain API compatibility; EVOLVE-BLOCK only
evolution_step.rationale: By adjusting the required_margin_factor, we can prioritize delay improvements over minor area savings, which is critical given the delay stagnation. This change is bounded in risk as it only affects phase dropping decisions without altering the core mapping logic.
